AI Insights
Based on your business data
New service
1 of 3
↔ Tap any step to view or edit: 1 2 3
Step 1 · Basics

Add a service

Tell us the basics first. We'll handle the math and show your real margin in the next step.

💡
Set staff commission in Teams. Each stylist's commission rate (e.g. Ravi 30%, Vikash 25%) is set on their profile. At checkout, tap the staff member who served the customer — their rate gets stamped on the bill automatically. Margin appears in Step 3 after you add supplies.
Step 2 · Supplies

What's used?

Add the items consumed per service. Cost auto-fills from your purchase price ÷ pack size.
